mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO vacuum_raw_metrics ( database_id, instance_id, collected_at, created_at, backend_pid, autovacuum, session_trigger, session_phase, session_progress, session_started_at, elapsed_seconds, wait_event_type, wait_event, progress_initializing, progress_scanning_heap, progress_vacuuming_heap, progress_vacuuming_cleanup, progress_truncating_heap, heap_blks_total, heap_blks_scanned, heap_blks_vacuumed, index_vacuum_count, pages_removed, pages_skipped_due_to_pin, pages_skipped_frozen, tuples_deleted, tuples_dead_but_not_removable, n_dead_tup, n_live_tup, last_vacuum, last_autovacuum, n_mod_since_analyze, relsize_total_bytes, relsize_heap_bytes, relsize_toast_bytes, relsize_indexes_bytes, running_vacuum_count, active_workers, max_workers, autovacuum_cost_delay_ms, autovacuum_cost_limit, is_blocked, blocker_pid, blocker_lock_mode, blocked_seconds, blocker_xmin_horizon, blocker_transaction_state, age_current_xid, age_max_freeze, wraparound_progress, wraparound_risk_level, table_name, schema_name, bloat_bytes, bloat_ratio, index_bloat_info, transaction_age, query_state, blocker_query ) VALUES
( #{item.databaseId}, #{item.instanceId}, #{item.collectedAt}, #{item.createdAt}, #{item.backendPid}, #{item.autovacuum}, #{item.sessionTrigger}, #{item.sessionPhase}, #{item.sessionProgress}, #{item.sessionStartedAt}, #{item.elapsedSeconds}, #{item.waitEventType}, #{item.waitEvent}, #{item.progressInitializing}, #{item.progressScanningHeap}, #{item.progressVacuumingHeap}, #{item.progressVacuumingCleanup}, #{item.progressTruncatingHeap}, #{item.heapBlksTotal}, #{item.heapBlksScanned}, #{item.heapBlksVacuumed}, #{item.indexVacuumCount}, #{item.pagesRemoved}, #{item.pagesSkippedDueToPin}, #{item.pagesSkippedFrozen}, #{item.tuplesDeleted}, #{item.tuplesDeadButNotRemovable}, #{item.nDeadTup}, #{item.nLiveTup}, #{item.lastVacuum}, #{item.lastAutovacuum}, #{item.nModSinceAnalyze}, #{item.relsizeTotalBytes}, #{item.relsizeHeapBytes}, #{item.relsizeToastBytes}, #{item.relsizeIndexesBytes}, #{item.runningVacuumCount}, #{item.activeWorkers}, #{item.maxWorkers}, #{item.autovacuumCostDelayMs}, #{item.autovacuumCostLimit}, #{item.isBlocked}, #{item.blockerPid}, #{item.blockerLockMode}, #{item.blockedSeconds}, #{item.blockerXminHorizon}, #{item.blockerTransactionState}, #{item.ageCurrentXid}, #{item.ageMaxFreeze}, #{item.wraparoundProgress}, #{item.wraparoundRiskLevel}, #{item.tableName}, #{item.schemaName}, #{item.bloatBytes}, #{item.bloatRatio}, #{item.indexBloatInfo, jdbcType=OTHER, typeHandler=org.apache.ibatis.type.StringTypeHandler}::jsonb, #{item.transactionAge}, #{item.queryState}, #{item.blockerQuery} )
mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT ON (table_name) table_name, last_vacuum, last_autovacuum FROM vacuum_raw_metrics WHERE database_id = #{databaseId, jdbcType=BIGINT} AND table_name IS NOT NULL AND (last_vacuum IS NOT NULL OR last_autovacuum IS NOT NULL) ORDER BY table_name, collected_at DESC

SELECT COALESCE( elapsed_seconds, CASE WHEN session_started_at IS NOT NULL AND collected_at IS NOT NULL THEN EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (collected_at - session_started_at))::INT ELSE NULL END ) AS duration_seconds FROM vacuum_raw_metrics WHERE database_id = #{databaseId, jdbcType=BIGINT} AND table_name = #{tableName, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND (session_phase IS NOT NULL AND session_phase != 'not_running' OR elapsed_seconds IS NOT NULL OR (session_started_at IS NOT NULL AND collected_at IS NOT NULL)) ORDER BY collected_at DESC LIMIT 1
